title: Corrective fix for B-997b348e: Verify bead state isolation and merge safety
description:
Blocked reason: Two production code bugs in _resolve_bead_state_conflicts cause 3 test failures. Bug A: checkout_side='--theirs' for direction='main' picks feature-branch bead state instead of main's — should always be '--ours'. Bug B: DU-status bead conflicts (git rm --cached on feature, modified on main) crash with 'does not have our version' — must use git rm for DU files. Both bugs are in src/agent_takt/gitutils.py lines 178-196.

Remaining work: Three test failures require production code fixes in src/agent_takt/gitutils.py._resolve_bead_state_conflicts: (1) Bug A — line 186 uses '--theirs' for direction='main' but should use '--ours'; both merge paths want the current branch's bead state and 'ours' is always correct. Affects test_final_merge_keeps_main_branch_bead_state_when_both_branches_track_it and test_existing_worktree_is_retrofitted_before_merge. (2) Bug B — DU-status bead conflicts (file deleted on feature, modified on main) crash with 'does not have our version' on git checkout --ours. Need git rm for DU-status files. Affects test_du_conflict_in_bead_state_resolves_via_rm.
acceptance_criteria: Implement the minimum fix required to unblock B-997b348e.
Update tests/docs as needed for the corrective change.
Leave a handoff summary that states how the parent bead can be retried.
conflict_risks: None — only test_merge_safety.py was modified; production code untouched.
